name: PvP Arena Masters
creator: Pickaxe Studios
shortDesc: 10 custom-built PvP arenas with automatic team balancing, spectator mode, leaderboards, and 4 game modes.
longDesc: PvP Arena Masters is a competitive multiplayer map for Minecraft Bedrock Edition featuring 10 professionally designed PvP arenas with 4 game modes, automatic team balancing, and a ranking system.
features: 10 Unique Arena Designs — Medieval Castle, Space Station, Jungle Temple, and more
4 Game Modes — Free-for-All, Team Deathmatch, Capture the Flag, King of the Hill
Automatic Team Balancing — Fair matches every time
Leaderboard & Ranking System — Track your competitive progress
2-16 Players — Supports small and large groups

reviews.author: PvPChamp
reviews.text: Best PvP map on the marketplace. The arenas are well-designed and the game modes keep it fresh.

faqs.q: What is the best Minecraft Bedrock PvP map?
faqs.a: PvP Arena Masters by Pickaxe Studios features 10 custom arenas, 4 game modes, and supports 2-16 players. Rated {rating} stars with {reviewCount}+ reviews.
